title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
